# Nexus AI

> Nexus AI is an all-in-one AI workspace for writing, research, chat, and creative work. Built by Verbosec, it turns ideas into finished documents, decks, images and code instead of stopping at a chat reply.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://mynexusai.com/): What Nexus AI is and who it's for.
- [Products](https://mynexusai.com/products): How Nexus AI is organised — Chat, Creative Studio, Code, Artifacts.
- [Chat](https://mynexusai.com/products/chat): The core chat surface, with Folders and model routing.
- [Features overview](https://mynexusai.com/features): Every feature/use case Nexus AI supports.
- [AI File Chat](https://mynexusai.com/features/ai-file-chat): Chat with uploaded PDFs, Word docs and spreadsheets, with sourced answers.
- [Academic Research](https://mynexusai.com/features/academic-research): Research-to-document workflow with citations (APA/MLA/Chicago).
- [AI Essay Writer](https://mynexusai.com/features/ai-essay-writer): Essay writing with an academic-integrity-first framing.
- [Artifacts](https://mynexusai.com/features/artifacts): Preview, edit and export AI-generated documents and slides.

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://mynexusai.com/pricing): Free ($0), Premium (~$20/mo, $16/mo annual) and Ultimate ($100/mo, $80/mo annual) plans.
- [Team Pricing](https://mynexusai.com/pricing/team): $30 per seat per month, 2-seat minimum.

## Downloads

- [Downloads](https://mynexusai.com/downloads): All supported platforms.
- [Mac](https://mynexusai.com/downloads/mac), [Windows](https://mynexusai.com/downloads/windows), [Mobile (iOS/Android)](https://mynexusai.com/downloads/mobile).
